title: Evil Larry Deep Dark BGM
description: Deep Dark biome music is replaced with the music from various Scariest Stories shorts.
body:
_Try not to get scared. Scariest Stories._

This pack adds the music track that's used in countless "Scariest Stories" shorts on YouTube, usually accompanied by various pictures of cats and a recurring "Evil Larry" character. The song is "Living in the Dark" by "Myuu", and is classified as royalty-free by the artist themselves so long as credit is given. The track plays in the Deep Dark biome. Music toast info is included in English US. Project is licensed identically to the music track.

Myuu's site: https://www.thedarkpiano.com/

The song itself:
